mapper.sql: rr.id, rr.request_no, rr.user_id, rr.amount, rr.status, rr.screenshot_path, rr.payer_remark, rr.reviewed_by, rr.reviewed_at, rr.reject_reason, rr.created_at, rr.updated_at, u.username, u.mail AS email, a.display_name AS reviewed_by_name
id, request_no, user_id, amount, status, screenshot_path, payer_remark, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, reject_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM member_recharge_request rr INNER JOIN member_user u ON u.id = rr.user_id LEFT JOIN admin_user a ON a.id = rr.reviewed_by WHERE rr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM member_recharge_request WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE member_recharge_request SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW(), reject_reason = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
